_synthetic: SYNTHETIC — hand-crafted chest-pain mid-case active-claim set for unit + property tests. No real patient data (rules.md §2.2).
_comment: Demo beat: 52-year-old reports exertional chest pain radiating to left arm with diaphoresis, prior CAD and smoker. No pleuritic component; no reproducibility with palpation. Cardiac leads; Pulmonary and GI are plausibly tied in the back of the race. Used by tests/unit/differential and tests/property/test_determinism.py.
